title: aluta maisonneuvei
side_effects: Aluta maisonneuvei can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause liver and kidney damage, which may lead to symptoms like fatigue, dark urine, and pale skin. In severe cases, improper use of the aluta maisonneuvei plant can lead to seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the aluta maisonneuvei plant for medicinal purposes.
